summary: Completed comprehensive testing of game_openness module integration (Phase 33). All 11 unit tests pass, 1089 total pytest tests pass (no regressions), all integration points verified, and all scenarios from review request validated successfully.

notes: No live matches currently active, so /api/live/reevaluate endpoint returns 404 for test match IDs (expected behavior)
API rate limit warnings present but unrelated to game_openness integration
Frontend testing not required per review request (backend only)

passed_tests: ✅ All 11 game_openness unit tests pass (test_game_openness.py)
✅ France case: one_sided_ratio=0.213 < 0.22 → Over 3.5 correctly rejected
✅ Mexico case: one_sided_ratio=0.44 > 0.22 → Over 2.5/BTTS correctly supported
✅ Empty stats handled gracefully (combined_xg=0, supports_over_35=False)
✅ guard_total_recommendation downgrades Over 3.5 to fallback when unsupported
✅ guard_total_recommendation marks not_actionable when no fallback exists
✅ guard_total_recommendation passes non-total markets unchanged
✅ guard_total_recommendation passes supported Over 3.5 unchanged
✅ interpret_live strips unsupported Over 3.5 when openness is one-sided
✅ interpret_live exposes game_openness in output
✅ interpret_live works without game_openness (fail-soft)
✅ compute_game_openness handles missing stats without crashing
✅ All imports work correctly (game_openness, live_reevaluation, human_live_interpreter)
✅ Constants accessible: MIN_SIDE_XG_FOR_OPEN=0.55, MIN_COMBINED_XG_FOR_OVER35=2.4, ONE_SIDED_RATIO_THRESHOLD=0.22
✅ No regressions: GET /api/picks/today?sport=football returns 200
✅ No regressions: GET /api/live/recommendation-events returns 200
✅ No regressions: GET /api/football/pattern-memory/summary returns 200
✅ Authentication works: POST /api/auth/login with demo@valuebet.app/demo1234
✅ Total pytest suite: 1089 tests pass (1078 original + 11 new)
✅ Integration verified: live_reevaluation.py computes openness at lines 280-290
✅ Integration verified: live_reevaluation.py passes openness to interpreter at line 304
✅ Integration verified: live_reevaluation.py exposes openness in response at line 552
✅ Integration verified: human_live_interpreter.py applies guard at lines 969-990
✅ Integration verified: human_live_interpreter.py exposes openness at line 1008

integration_points: Line 304: Passes openness to interpreter in reeval_for_interpreter['game_openness']
Line 552: Exposes game_openness in response dict
Line 969: Reads game_openness from reeval dict
Line 977-981: Downgrades market and inserts reason when guard.downgraded=True
Line 983-988: Strips market to None when guard.not_actionable=True
Line 1008: Exposes game_openness in interpreter output

france_case.description: France 1-2 Ivory Coast: xG home=1.85, away=0.50

guard_downgrade.description: Guard downgrades Over 3.5 to Over 2.5 when fallback exists

guard_not_actionable.description: Guard marks not_actionable when no fallback

live_reevaluate_endpoint.note: Cannot test with real match_id as no live matches are currently active
live_reevaluate_endpoint.expected_structure: Response should include game_openness field when match is live
live_reevaluate_endpoint.status: ✅ Structure verified via unit tests and code review
